title: Day 43 Lesson 3 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - もう　プレゼンテーションの　しりょうを　つくりましたか。= Have you already prepared the presentation's documents?

Sentence 2 - はい、　もう　つくりました。= Yes, I already did.

Sentence 3 - いいえ、まだ作っていません。=No, I haven't prepared it yet.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
